options.systemMessage: You map a club-registry API's fields to our schema. Given sample objects, return ONLY a JSON object (no prose, no fences): {"name": <srcKey|null>, "city": <srcKey|null>, "region": <srcKey|null>, "website": <srcKey|null>, "source_id": <srcKey|null>}. Use the EXACT source field key names. name=the club's name; city=its city/town; region=state/province/regional federation; website=the club's own website URL; source_id=a stable unique id for the club. If a field is absent, use null.
